description: Enhanced PostgreSQL statement analysis dashboard with comprehensive table view and visual analytics

panels.description:
Comprehensive query performance analysis from pg_stat_statements.

**Column Guide:**
- **Query ID** - Internal PostgreSQL query identifier (click to drill down)
- **Total Runtime** - Total cumulative execution time
- **% DB Total** - Percentage of total database execution time
- **Avg Runtime** - Average execution time per call
- **Plan Time** - Total time spent planning queries
- **Avg Plan Time** - Average planning time per call
- **Calls** - Number of times executed
- **Rows** - Total rows retrieved/affected
- **Avg Rows** - Average rows per execution
- **Shared Hit (MB)** - Buffer cache hits - data found in memory (higher is better)
- **Shared Read (MB)** - Data read from disk into shared buffers (cache misses)
- **Shared Written (MB)** - Data written from shared buffers to disk
- **Temp Read (MB)** - Data read from temporary files (indicates memory pressure)
- **Temp Written (MB)** - Data written to temporary files during large operations
- **JIT %** - Percentage of total query execution time spent in JIT
- **IO Time** - Time spent on disk I/O operations (requires track_io_timing)
- **Users** - Database roles that executed this query
- **Query** - Normalized SQL text with constants replaced by placeholders

value.title: Opens 'Single query details' dashboard for that queryid

targets.rawSql:
-- Enhanced comprehensive query analysis (Fast mode)
WITH query_stats AS (
  select
    tag_data->>'queryid' as queryid,
    max((data->>'total_time')::numeric) - min((data->>'total_time')::numeric) as total_runtime,
    (max((data->>'total_time')::numeric) - min((data->>'total_time')::numeric)) / nullif(max((data->>'calls')::int8) - min((data->>'calls')::int8), 0) as avg_runtime,
    max((data->>'total_plan_time')::numeric) - min((data->>'total_plan_time')::numeric) as plan_time,
    (max((data->>'total_plan_time')::numeric) - min((data->>'total_plan_time')::numeric)) / nullif(max((data->>'calls')::int8) - min((data->>'calls')::int8), 0) as avg_plan_time,
    max((data->>'calls')::int8) - min((data->>'calls')::int8) as calls,
    max((data->>'rows')::int8) - min((data->>'rows')::int8) as rows,
    (max((data->>'rows')::int8) - min((data->>'rows')::int8))::numeric / nullif(max((data->>'calls')::int8) - min((data->>'calls')::int8), 0) as avg_rows,
    (max((data->>'shared_blks_hit')::int8) - min((data->>'shared_blks_hit')::int8)) * 8192 / 1024.0 / 1024.0 as shared_hit_mb,
    (max((data->>'shared_blks_read')::int8) - min((data->>'shared_blks_read')::int8)) * 8192 / 1024.0 / 1024.0 as shared_read_mb,
    (max((data->>'shared_blks_written')::int8) - min((data->>'shared_blks_written')::int8)) * 8192 / 1024.0 / 1024.0 as shared_written_mb,
    (max((data->>'temp_blks_read')::int8) - min((data->>'temp_blks_read')::int8)) * 8192 / 1024.0 / 1024.0 as temp_read_mb,
    (max((data->>'temp_blks_written')::int8) - min((data->>'temp_blks_written')::int8)) * 8192 / 1024.0 / 1024.0 as temp_written_mb,
    (max((data->>'blk_read_time')::numeric) - min((data->>'blk_read_time')::numeric)) + 
    (max((data->>'blk_write_time')::numeric) - min((data->>'blk_write_time')::numeric)) as io_time,
    (max((data->>'jit_generation_time')::numeric) - min((data->>'jit_generation_time')::numeric)) as jit_time,
    case when length(tag_data->>'query') > 150 then (tag_data->>'query')::varchar(150) || '...' else tag_data->>'query' end as query
  from stat_statements
  where dbname = '$dbname'
    and $__timeFilter(time)
    and tag_data->>'query' ~* '$query_filter_regex'
  group by tag_data->>'queryid', tag_data->>'query'
  having max((data->>'calls')::int8) - min((data->>'calls')::int8) > 0
),
with_percentages AS (
  select 
    *,
    100 * total_runtime / nullif((select sum(total_runtime) from query_stats), 0) as pct_db_total
  from query_stats
)
select
  queryid,
  total_runtime::numeric as "Total Runtime",
  pct_db_total::numeric(5,1) as "% DB Total",
  avg_runtime::numeric(10,2) as "Avg Runtime",
  plan_time::numeric as "Plan Time",
  avg_plan_time::numeric(10,2) as "Avg Plan Time",
  calls as "Calls",
  rows as "Rows",
  avg_rows::numeric(10,1) as "Avg Rows",
  shared_hit_mb::numeric(10,1) as "Shared Hit",
  shared_read_mb::numeric(10,1) as "Shared Read",
  shared_written_mb::numeric(10,1) as "Shared Written",
  temp_read_mb::numeric(10,1) as "Temp Read",
  temp_written_mb::numeric(10,1) as "Temp Written",
  case when total_runtime::int8 = 0 then 0 else jit_time::numeric(10, 2) / total_runtime::int8 end as "JIT %",
  io_time::numeric(10,1) as "IO Time",
  (select data->>'users' from stat_statements where $__timeFilter(time) and dbname = '$dbname' and tag_data->>'queryid' = with_percentages.queryid order by time desc limit 1) as "Users",
  query as "Query"
from with_percentages
order by total_runtime desc nulls last
limit $top

panels.title: Enhanced Query Performance Analysis Table

targets.rawSql:
with baseline as (
  select time
  from stat_statements
  where dbname = '$dbname' and time < $__timeFrom()::timestamptz
  order by time desc
  limit 1
)

select
  time,
  queryid as metric,
  calls_per_sec
from
(
  select 
    *,
    row_number() over (partition by time order by calls_per_sec desc nulls last) as rn
  from
  (
    select
      $__timeGroup(time, $agg_interval) as time,
      queryid,
      sum(c - c_lag) / nullif(extract(epoch from sum(time - time_lag)), 0) as calls_per_sec
    from (
      select
        tag_data->>'queryid' as queryid,
        (data->>'calls')::int8 as c, lag((data->>'calls')::int8) over w as c_lag,
        time, lag(time) over w as time_lag
      from stat_statements
      where time <= $__timeTo()::timestamptz
        and time >= coalesce((select time from baseline), $__timeFrom()::timestamptz)
        and dbname = '$dbname'
        and tag_data->>'query' ~* '$query_filter_regex'
      window w as (partition by tag_data->>'queryid' order by time)
    )
    where time_lag is not null
    group by 1, 2
  )
)
where rn <= $top and calls_per_sec is not null
order by time

panels.title: Top $top statements by calls per second

targets.rawSql:
with baseline as (
  select time
  from stat_statements
  where dbname = '$dbname' and time < $__timeFrom()::timestamptz
  order by time desc
  limit 1
)

select
  time,
  queryid as metric,
  time_per_sec
from
(
  select 
    *,
    row_number() over (partition by time order by time_per_sec desc nulls last) as rn
  from
  (
    select
      $__timeGroup(time, $agg_interval) as time,
      queryid,
      sum(t - t_lag) / nullif(extract(epoch from sum(time - time_lag)), 0) as time_per_sec
    from (
      select
        tag_data->>'queryid' as queryid,
        (data->>'total_time')::float8 as t, lag((data->>'total_time')::float8) over w as t_lag,
        time, lag(time) over w as time_lag
      from stat_statements
      where time <= $__timeTo()::timestamptz
        and time >= coalesce((select time from baseline), $__timeFrom()::timestamptz)
        and dbname = '$dbname'
        and tag_data->>'query' ~* '$query_filter_regex'
      window w as (partition by tag_data->>'queryid' order by time)
    )
    where time_lag is not null
    group by 1, 2
  )
)
where rn <= $top and time_per_sec is not null
order by time

panels.title: Top $top statements by execution time per second

targets.rawSql:
with baseline as (
  select time
  from stat_statements
  where dbname = '$dbname' and time < $__timeFrom()::timestamptz
  order by time desc
  limit 1
)

select
  time,
  queryid as metric,
  time_per_call
from
(
  select 
    *,
    row_number() over (partition by time order by time_per_call desc nulls last) as rn
  from
  (
    select
      $__timeGroup(time, $agg_interval) as time,
      queryid,
      sum(t - t_lag) / nullif(sum(c - c_lag), 0) as time_per_call
    from (
      select
        time,
        tag_data->>'queryid' as queryid,
        (data->>'total_time')::float8 as t, lag((data->>'total_time')::float8) over w as t_lag,
        (data->>'calls')::int8 as c, lag((data->>'calls')::int8) over w as c_lag
      from stat_statements
      where time <= $__timeTo()::timestamptz
        and time >= coalesce((select time from baseline), $__timeFrom()::timestamptz)
        and dbname = '$dbname'
        and tag_data->>'query' ~* '$query_filter_regex'
      window w as (partition by tag_data->>'queryid' order by time)
    )
    where c_lag is not null
    group by 1, 2
  )
)
where rn <= $top and time_per_call is not null
order by time

panels.title: Top $top statements by execution time per call

targets.rawSql:
with baseline as (
  select time
  from stat_statements
  where dbname = '$dbname' and time < $__timeFrom()::timestamptz
  order by time desc
  limit 1
)

select
  time,
  queryid as metric,
  blks_hit_per_sec * 8192
from
(
  select 
    *,
    row_number() over (partition by time order by blks_hit_per_sec desc nulls last) as rn
  from
  (
    select
      $__timeGroup(time, $agg_interval) as time,
      queryid,
      sum(blks_hit - blks_hit_lag) / nullif(extract(epoch from sum(time - time_lag)), 0) as blks_hit_per_sec
    from (
      select
        tag_data->>'queryid' as queryid,
        (data->>'shared_blks_hit')::int8 as blks_hit, lag((data->>'shared_blks_hit')::int8) over w as blks_hit_lag,
        time, lag(time) over w as time_lag
      from stat_statements
      where time <= $__timeTo()::timestamptz
        and time >= coalesce((select time from baseline), $__timeFrom()::timestamptz)
        and dbname = '$dbname'
        and tag_data->>'query' ~* '$query_filter_regex'
      window w as (partition by tag_data->>'queryid' order by time)
    )
    where time_lag is not null
    group by 1, 2
  )
)
where rn <= $top and blks_hit_per_sec is not null
order by time

panels.title: Top $top statements by shared_blks_hit per second (in bytes)

    where time_lag is not null

  )
)
where rn <= $top and blks_read_per_sec is not null
order by time

with baseline as (
  select time
  from stat_statements
  where dbname = '$dbname' and time < $__timeFrom()::timestamptz

  time,
  queryid as metric,
  temp_blks_read_per_sec * 8192
from
(
  select 
    *,
    row_number() over (partition by time order by temp_blks_read_per_sec desc nulls last) as rn

        and tag_data->>'query' ~* '$query_filter_regex'
      window w as (partition by tag_data->>'queryid' order by time)

    where time_lag is not null

targets.rawSql:
with baseline as (
  select time
  from stat_statements
  where dbname = '$dbname' and time < $__timeFrom()::timestamptz
  order by time desc
  limit 1
)

select
  time,
  queryid as metric,
  temp_blks_written_per_sec * 8192
from
(
  select 
    *,
    row_number() over (partition by time order by temp_blks_written_per_sec desc nulls last) as rn
  from
  (
    select
      $__timeGroup(time, $agg_interval) as time,
      queryid,

        tag_data->>'queryid' as queryid,

        time, lag(time) over w as time_lag
      from stat_statements
      where time <= $__timeTo()::timestamptz
        and time >= coalesce((select time from baseline), $__timeFrom()::timestamptz)
        and dbname = '$dbname'
        and tag_data->>'query' ~* '$query_filter_regex'

panels.title: Top $top statements by temp_blks_written per second (in bytes)

targets.rawSql:
with baseline as (
  select time
  from stat_statements
  where dbname = '$dbname' and time < $__timeFrom()::timestamptz
  order by time desc
  limit 1
)

select
  time,
  queryid as metric,
  rows_per_sec
from
(
  select 
    *,
    row_number() over (partition by time order by rows_per_sec desc nulls last) as rn
  from
  (
    select
      $__timeGroup(time, $agg_interval) as time,
      queryid,
      sum(rows - rows_lag) / nullif(extract(epoch from sum(time - time_lag)), 0) as rows_per_sec
    from (
      select
        tag_data->>'queryid' as queryid,
        (data->>'rows')::int8 as rows, lag((data->>'rows')::int8) over w as rows_lag,
        time, lag(time) over w as time_lag
      from stat_statements
      where time <= $__timeTo()::timestamptz
        and time >= coalesce((select time from baseline), $__timeFrom()::timestamptz)
        and dbname = '$dbname'
        and tag_data->>'query' ~* '$query_filter_regex'
      window w as (partition by tag_data->>'queryid' order by time)
    )
    where time_lag is not null
    group by 1, 2
  )
)
where rn <= $top and rows_per_sec is not null
order by time

panels.title: Top $top statements by rows retrieved/affected per second

options.content: ## Brought to you by

list.label: Database
list.name: dbname
list.query: SELECT DISTINCT dbname FROM admin.all_distinct_dbname_metrics WHERE metric = 'stat_statements' ORDER BY 1;

list.description: Limit output to top N entries
list.label: Top N
list.name: top

list.description: Custom regex filter for queries. Examples: '.*' (all queries), '^(?!.*pgwatch_generated)' (exclude pgwatch_generated), '(SELECT|INSERT)' (include only SELECT/INSERT), '^(?!.*(SELECT|INSERT))' (exclude SELECT/INSERT), 'UPDATE.*^(?!.*WHERE)' (dangerous UPDATEs without WHERE - security risk).
list.label: Filter RegEx
list.name: query_filter_regex

title: 3. Query Performance Analysis
